description: Stout, bearded mountain folk carving great halls from stone and forging legendary weapons.
subraces: Hill Dwarf
Hardy settlers of the foothills, known for keen intuition and herbal remedies.
Mountain Dwarf
Deep-delving miners and smiths building fortress-cities inside living rock.
Duergar (Gray Dwarf)
Grim underdark exiles hardened by centuries of mind flayer enslavement and psionic discipline.
Shield Dwarf
Battle-scarred defenders of the northern holds, forged by endless wars with orcs and goblins.
Gold Dwarf
Wealthy southern clans ruling vast underground trade empires with proud formality.
Wild Dwarf
Jungle-dwelling outcasts painting their skin and hunting with blowguns and poison.
Arctic Dwarf
Frost-resistant clans thriving in glacial caverns far beyond the tundra line.
Jungle Dwarf
Canopy-dwelling trappers building bridges between giant trees and taming exotic beasts.
Mark of Warding Dwarf
Dragonmarked locksmiths and bankers whose magic seals vaults and binds wards.
Gully Dwarf
Scrawny, simple-minded scavengers surviving in the filthiest places others abandon.
Dark Iron Dwarf
Fire-resistant smiths forging in volcanic heat and serving fiery overlords.
Deep Dwarf
Pale, silent miners who rarely surface, navigating the deepest caverns by sound alone.
